name: Career Forge (GenAI)
desc: ATS Optimizer and Interview Generator. Upload resumes, analyze job descriptions, detect skill gaps, and generate AI-powered interview prep materials using GenAI.

name: MessKhata
desc: A live full-stack mess management web app built using React 19, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase. Features PostgreSQL RLS, custom indexing, auto-archiving, and automated WhatsApp notifications.

name: Employee Management System
desc: Role-based employee task management system using React, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, and MongoDB. Features separate Admin/Employee dashboards and local storage state persistence.

name: AI Coding & Interview Platform
desc: Full-stack AI-powered coding practice platform featuring 200+ coding problems, mock interviews, automated code evaluation with real-time AI feedback and progress tracking.

name: Time Table Management
desc: Role-based scheduler with automated scheduling workflows built using React, Supabase, Golang, and Git/GitHub. Optimized with code-splitting and lazy loading.
